theorem candidate_T1_free (ПҮ : Character G) (hПҮ : ПҮ вү  1) :
    вҲ‘ g : G, (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) = 0 := by
  classical
  by_cases hsum : (вҲ‘ g : G, (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ)) = 0
  В· exact hsum
  В· exfalso
    apply hПҮ
    ext g
    have hmain : (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ) = вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ) := by
      calc
        (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ)
            = вҲ‘ x : G, ((ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ)) := by
                simp [mul_sum]
        _ = вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ (g * x) : в„Ӯ) := by
              refine Finset.sum_congr rfl ?_
              intro x hx
              simp
        _ = вҲ‘ y : G, (ПҮ y : в„Ӯ) := by
              exact Fintype.sum_bijective (fun x : G => g * x) (by
                intro a
                simp) 
        _ = вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ) := rfl
    have hg : (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) = 1 := by
      apply mul_right_cancelвӮҖ (show (вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ)) вү  0 from hsum)
      simpa [one_mul] using hmain
    exact hg

```

  classical
  let S : в„Ӯ := вҲ‘ g : G, (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ)
  by_cases hS : S = 0
  В· simpa [S] using hS
  В· exfalso
    apply hПҮ
    apply MulChar.ext'
    intro g
    have hmul : (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * S = S := by
      calc
        (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * S = (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ) := by rfl
        _ = вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) * (ПҮ x : в„Ӯ) := by
              rw [mul_sum]
        _ = вҲ‘ x : G, (ПҮ (g * x) : в„Ӯ) := by
              refine Fintype.sum_congr ?_ ?_
              В· rfl
              В· intro x
                simp
        _ = вҲ‘ y : G, (ПҮ y : в„Ӯ) := by
              exact Function.Bijective.sum_comp
                (e := fun x : G => g * x)
                (by
                  refine вҹЁ?_, ?_вҹ©
                  В· intro a b hab
                    simpa using (mul_left_cancel hab)
                  В· intro y
                    refine вҹЁgвҒ»В№ * y, ?_вҹ©
                    simp [mul_assoc]
                )
                (fun y : G => (ПҮ y : в„Ӯ))
        _ = S := by rfl
    have hg : (ПҮ g : в„Ӯ) = 1 := by
      apply mul_right_cancelвӮҖ hS
      simpa [one_mul] using hmul
    exact hg

```
